description_long: This is a modern bed with a dark, likely wooden or composite frame featuring a prominent rectangular headboard. The bed is topped with a light gray sheet or comforter that covers most of the mattress, leaving a portion of a red under-sheet and a single pillow exposed. The frame sits on short, sturdy legs, elevating the bed slightly above the ground. The headboard is solid and flat, providing a clean, minimalist look, while the foot of the bed is simple and unadorned. The bedding appears soft and inviting, contrasting with the hard, sleek finish of the frame. The overall design suggests a contemporary platform style suitable for urban interiors.
description: A modern platform bed with a dark frame, light gray bedding, and a solid rectangular headboard. The bed features a red under-sheet and a single pillow for a minimalist, urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid headboard, red under-sheet, gray bedding, and pillow on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headboard, centered pillow, and the full width of the bed.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the pillow on the right, showing the same bedding and frame details.
description_view_3: Foot view displaying the simple, unadorned end of the bed and the frame's width.
